violations.text: No person certified in food safety was present as needed at the time of inspection. Employee provided proof of enrollment for servsafe class (June 17). Application provided to establishment. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/20/2025
-Observed prep table located in the backroom area was not in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the service line was observed to have an accumulation of dust and debris (old droppings). Equipment is to be thoroughly cleaned to aid in the monitoring of the current pest control program. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/17/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety that is registered with RIDOH CFP. Owner to ensure a person certified in food safety on-site at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. At least one person that is certified in food safety that works full-time at this location is to be register with RIDOH CFP. New Violation. Correct By: 04/17/2025

Precooked eggs were observed held at (47) degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Staff voluntarily disposed precooked eggs. New Violation. Correct By: 04/17/2025

Thermometers are lacking in the cold service line. Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/03/2025

-Observed dirty knife stored on clean magnetic knife storage strip. PIC relocated dirty knife to 3-bay to wash, rinse, and sanitize. Knife magnetic strip shall be washed, rinsed and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/17/2025
The following equipment: 1. Prep table located in the backroom area. 2. Pre-flush hose anchor loose/not attached to wall was not in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the front service area counter shelving was observed to have an accumulation of dust and debris (old droppings). Equipment is to be thoroughly cleaned to aid in the monitoring of the current pest control program. New Violation. Correct By: 04/17/2025

The covings in the back prep area, near the walk-in cooler and wall panel by the beverage machine was in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/17/2025
No person certified in food safety was present as needed at the time of inspection. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/20/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer) was observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/20/2025

Food contact surface of sandwich wrapping paper was observed in direct contact with rodent droppings. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC disposed of contaminated sandwich wrapping papers. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/03/2025

Thermometers are lacking in the cold service line. Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/03/2025

The presence of rodent activity is not controlled as evidence of droppings observed underneath/behind equipment and in the back storage area, on shelving). The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Establishment must clean areas where rodent activity observed. Establishment must monitor activity. Establishment must get pest control to come and perform a full assessment of facility. A plan of action must be provided to inspector. Must provide reports from pest control. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/20/2025

The covings in the back prep area, near the walk-in cooler and wall panel by the beverage machine was in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/17/2025
No person certified in food safety was present as needed at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 03/20/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (vegetable cutter) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 03/20/2025

Thermometers are lacking in the cold service line. Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 04/03/2025

The presence of rodent activity is not controlled as evidence of droppings observed underneath/behind equipment and in the back storage area, on shelving). The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Establishment must clean areas where rodent activity observed. Establishment must monitor activity. Establishment must get pest control to come and perform a full assessment of facility. A plan of action must be provided to inspector. New Violation. Correct By: 03/20/2025

The condensate from the cold case observed dripping inside unit and condensation of beverage machine is draining into a container. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 03/20/2025

The floor and wall junctures in the back area to the right of the walk-in cooler does not have coving. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. New Violation. Correct By: 04/17/2025

The pre-flush spray hose at the three bay sink is hanging below the flood rim. A plumbing system shall be installed to prevent backflow of a liquid or gas contaminant into the water supply by providing an air gap or installing an approved backflow prevention device. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/19/2024
No person certified in food safety was present as needed at the time of inspection. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/05/2024
An allergy statement is lacking for the customer to inform the server of any allergies. Allergy statement to be added. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/05/2024
The hand-washing sink in the back prep area was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/20/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/20/2024

Meatballs were observed held at 120 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC re-heated food at time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/20/2024
Working containers used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/20/2024
Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/20/2024

The pre-flush spray hose at the three bay sink is hanging below the flood rim. A plumbing system shall be installed to prevent backflow of a liquid or gas contaminant into the water supply by providing an air gap or installing an approved backflow prevention device. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/19/2024
The condensate from the walk-in cooler is draining into two containers. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/19/2024

The floor in the front service area has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/19/2024
An allergy statement is lacking for the customer to inform the server of any allergies. Allergy statement to be added. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/05/2024
No person certified in food safety was present as needed at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 02/05/2024
The hand-washing sink in the back prep area was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/05/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (vegetable slicer and deli slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/05/2024

Meatballs were observed held at 102 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC voluntarily disposed of food and re-heated new meatballs for use. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/05/2024
Working containers used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. New Violation. Correct By: 02/05/2024

The establishment is lacking a thermometer to test food temperatures. Food temperature measuring devices shall be provided and be readily accessible for checking cooking, cooling, reheating, and hot/cold holding temperatures of time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. PIC purchased thermometer at time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/05/2024

Insect lights were observed placed in close proximity to food prep and food service areas. Insect control devices shall be installed so that: (1) The devices are not located over a FOOD preparation area; and (2) Dead insects and insect fragments are prevented from being impelled onto or falling on exposed FOOD; clean EQUIPMENT, UTENSILS, and LINENS; and unwrapped SINGLESERVICE and SINGLE-USE ARTICLES. New Violation. Correct By: 02/12/2024
Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean in the ( ) area. New Violation. Correct By: 02/05/2024

The blades of the veggie slicer were in poor repair (observed chipped/warped). Inspector instructed PIC to take slicer out of service. Slicer is not to be used until blades are replaced. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/05/2024

The pre-flush spray hose at the three bay sink is hanging below the flood rim. A plumbing system shall be installed to prevent backflow of a liquid or gas contaminant into the water supply by providing an air gap or installing an approved backflow prevention device. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/19/2024
The condensate from the walk-in cooler is draining into two containers. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/19/2024

The floor throughout the front service areas has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris and the ceiling vents in the back ware-washing area had an accumulation of dust. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 02/19/2024
A mop was observed being stored in stagnant water between uses. Mops must be allowed to air dry after use. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/05/2024
An allergy statement is lacking for the customer to inform the server of any allergies. Allergy statement to be added. New Violation. Correct By: 05/26/2023

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (deli slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Slicer to not be used until washed rinsed and sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 05/26/2023

The pre-flush spray hose at the 3-bay is hanging below the flood rim. A plumbing system shall be installed to prevent backflow of a liquid or gas contaminant into the water supply by providing an air gap or installing an approved backflow prevention device. New Violation. Correct By: 06/09/2023

The condensate from the walk-in refrigeration unit is draining into a container. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. Establishment to email inspector with proof of service of walk-in. New Violation. Correct By: 06/09/2023
